Profile

About Me

I am a detail-oriented SEO Executive with an MBA in Marketing & Finance and practical, real-world SEO experience. I currently work as an SEO Executive Intern at Appenius Technologies, handling keyword research, content planning and on-page SEO for multiple client industries — including washing machine repair services and travel agencies.

Before this, I worked as a Digital Marketing Executive at Platinaa Industrial Ceramics, where I managed SEO and website development end-to-end — including building two live business websites from scratch.

My goal is to grow as an SEO Executive in Hyderabad, applying strong technical SEO and content optimization skills to improve rankings and generate quality organic traffic.

Client Website
